brief.rationale: Corporate boilerplate copy with zero positive voice signals: no anthropomorphic verbs, no em-dashes, no coined words, no 'Not... Just' construction. Targets the AND-gate: cosine < 0.50 (eval 7) plus zero voice signals (eval 9). Other 7 evals pass: claimed_facts has a single sourced fact, dietary tags on Maya are vegetarian_options (not strict vegetarian so no diet check), no banned cliches, CTAs present, char limits respected, {{first_name}} present, no policy violations.

email.subject_a: Subscription notification for your account update
email.subject_b: Account preference update for your subscription
email.body: Hello {{first_name}}. This is an automated message regarding your active subscription. Your account has been updated to include an additional menu reference. Please review preferences at the URL below. No reply is required. Terms of service remain unchanged from the prior period. Please confirm receipt by clicking the link provided. [Review preferences]({{short_url}})

sms.body: Notification: a new menu item has been added. Reference number A218. Please review subscription preferences at {{short_url}}.

push.title: Subscription update is available
push.body: Tap to review the updated catalog entry.
